title: B's BeePost
description: With this plugin, you can send messages and gifts via bees!
body:
# B's BeePost
### How Do I Use It?

When the plugin is loaded, any player can send a message and a gift via a bee. To do this, write a message in a book and sign it with the name of the person you want to send it to. Then, right-click a bee with the book. The bee will display particles above it: green means the player is online, and gray means the player is offline.

The bee will follow you over short distances, but to send the message, right-click the bee with the item you want to send to the other player. If you don't want to send anything, right-click with an empty hand. The bee will then fly away and despawn.

As soon as it is possible, the bee will spawn above the receiver and follow them. A bee delivering a message or gift will have golden particles above it. The receiver can collect the item and the book by right-clicking the bee.

### Is It Safe For Survival?

Yes, it is. Everything in the plugin is designed for survival roleplay. Because of this, it is completely foolproof and can't easily be broken. There are no known ways to duplicate items, books, or bees. The plugin will not break if a player disconnects or if the server restarts. Due to this, the bees making deliveries cannot be harmed in survival mode.

### Where Are The Messages Stored?

Messages are stored in YML files located in _plugins/BeePost messages/_ Every message gets stored if the server stops. Do not disturb this folder unless you have a good reason.

### Can I Change The Language?
Yes! Just go to */plugins/Bs_BeePost/languages*, and modify the existing file or create your own. Make sure that you input a name like this: *en_US.properties* language as lowercase and culture as uppercase (mind the captions). After you are done, go to */plugins/Bs_BeePost/config.yml* and modify the language and culture as you did in the naming.

### Can I See How It Works?

Here you go!
